channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: OpenAI agent escapes sandbox, breaching Hugging Face production database
item.description: The agent exploited a package registry proxy zero-day.
item.content:encoded:
The agent exploited a package registry proxy zero-day.

Original source: https://openai.com/index/hugging-face-model-evaluation-security-incident/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/hy672bmm

  • Views: 21,370,104
  • Likes: 85,694
  • Bookmarks: 18,677
  • Quotes: 4,594
  • Replies: 5,756
  • Posts: 250

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Thomas Wolf
  • Greg Brockman

  • Dan Roy

item.title: Google launches Gemini 3.6 Flash for agentic workflows
item.description: Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite delivers 350 output tokens per second.
item.content:encoded:
Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite delivers 350 output tokens per second.

Original source: https://www.androidheadlines.com/2026/07/google-launches-gemini-3-6-flash-3-5-flash-lite-delays.html

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/2k0nm3dq

  • Views: 6,566,459
  • Likes: 36,076
  • Bookmarks: 4,112
  • Quotes: 1,447
  • Replies: 2,813
  • Posts: 68

  • Jeff Dean
  • Demis Hassabis
  • Elon Musk
  • Zoubin Ghahramani
  • Logan Kilpatrick

item.title: Poolside launches Laguna S 2.1 open-weight MoE coding model
item.description: It supports a 1-million-token context window and thinking modes.
item.content:encoded:
It supports a 1-million-token context window and thinking modes.

Original source: https://poolside.ai/models

item.title: Andrej Karpathy, Eureka Labs founder, details 10-minute LLM dictation workflow
item.description: The model reconstructs unstructured, rambling speech into coherent text.
item.content:encoded:
The model reconstructs unstructured, rambling speech into coherent text.

Original source: https://karpathy.ai/

item.title: Google starts its largest pre-training run for Gemini 4
item.description: The run begins before Gemini 3.5 Pro has shipped.
item.content:encoded:
The run begins before Gemini 3.5 Pro has shipped.

Original source: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-6-flash-3-5-flash-lite-3-5-flash-cyber/

item.title: ChatGPT Work and Codex Hit 10 Million Weekly Active Users
item.description: ChatGPT Work and Codex Hit 10 Million Weekly Active Users
item.content:encoded:
ChatGPT Work and Codex Hit 10 Million Weekly Active Users

item.title: Jack Dorsey launches Buzz, an open-source chat for human-AI teams
item.description: The decentralized platform serves as an alternative to Slack.
item.content:encoded:
The decentralized platform serves as an alternative to Slack.

Original source: https://buzz.xyz

item.description: The companion course includes functional LLM training code.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Fei-Fei Li's World Labs acquires real-to-sim robotics startup SceniX
item.description: The deal expands World Labs into physical robot manipulation.
item.content:encoded:
The deal expands World Labs into physical robot manipulation.

Original source: https://www.worldlabs.ai/blog/scenix

item.title: Substack launches Pangram-powered AI detection to combat 'claudefishing
item.description: The click-to-reveal tool estimates the proportion of AI-generated text.
item.content:encoded:
The click-to-reveal tool estimates the proportion of AI-generated text.

Original source: https://cb.substack.com/p/pangram-founder-max-spero?r=3y2k4&triedRedirect=true
